title: valeriana speluncaria var. glabriuscula
intro: Valeriana speluncaria var. glabriuscula, also known as a variety of the cave valerian, is a plant species within the Valeriana genus that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant contains various bioactive compounds, including valepotriates and isovalerenol, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Valeriana speluncaria var. glabriuscula have been traditionally used to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, and its health benefits include reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. In herbal medicine, Valeriana speluncaria var. glabriuscula can be prepared as teas, tinctures, or capsules, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its therapeutic effects.
